scripts.fresh: bunx rimraf .expo android ios node_modules && bun install && expo prebuild
scripts.ios:build:device: bunx rimraf .expo ios && expo prebuild && fastlane ios dev_device
scripts.release:android:prebuild: bunx rimraf .expo android && RELEASE=true expo prebuild
scripts.release:ios:prebuild: bunx rimraf .expo ios && RELEASE=true expo prebuild
scripts.release:both:prebuild: bunx rimraf .expo ios android && RELEASE=true expo prebuild
scripts.release:both:build: bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "android,ios" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "bun run release:android:build" "bun run release:ios:build"
scripts.release:build: bun run release:both:prebuild && bun run release:both:build
scripts.release:production: bun run release:build && bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "android,ios" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "bun run fastlane:android:distribute-play-store" "bun run fastlane:ios:distribute-app-store"
scripts.release:internal: bun run release:build && bunx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "android,ios" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "bun run fastlane:android:distribute-internal" "bun run fastlane:ios:distribute-testflight"
scripts.release:ios:production: bun run release:ios:prebuild && bun run release:ios:build && bun run fastlane:ios:distribute-app-store
scripts.release:ios:internal: bun run release:ios:prebuild && bun run release:ios:build && bun run fastlane:ios:distribute-testflight
scripts.release:android:production: bun run release:android:prebuild && bun run release:android:build && bun run fastlane:android:distribute-play-store
scripts.release:android:internal: bun run release:android:prebuild && bun run release:android:build && bun run fastlane:android:distribute-internal
